CONCEPT

Dataplane Testing

Meaning

Runs network traffic between wireless stations and upstream interfaces while measuring throughput, latency, packet loss and other KPIs.

Purpose

Measure network performance under controlled conditions.

Scripts

lf_continuous_throughput_test.py
lf_wifi_capacity_test.py

lf_interop_video_streaming.py

station
upstream_port
rate
duration
report
debug

Realm.py
StationProfile.py
DataplaneProfile.py

Throughput
Latency
Packet Loss
Jitter

create_station.py

TASK

Create Wireless Station

Primary Script

create_station.py

Purpose

Creates a wireless station and applies WiFi configuration such as SSID, security and password.

Typical User Requests

create station

add station

new station

wireless station

Required Parameters

radio

ssid

security

password

Optional Parameters

station

bssid

channel

country_code

Category

Station Provisioning

TASK

Create Layer 3 Stations

Primary Script

create_l3_stations.py

Purpose

Creates one or more Layer 3 wireless stations using the specified radio and WiFi configuration.

Typical User Requests

create l3 stations

create layer3 stations

create stations

generate stations

add stations

Required Parameters

radio

ssid

security

password

Optional Parameters

number_of_stations

bssid

channel

Category

Station Provisioning

TASK

Create WAN Link

Primary Script

lf_create_wanlink.py

Purpose

Creates a WAN link between two LANforge ports with configurable impairment settings.

Typical User Requests

wan link

new wan link

Required Parameters

port_A

port_B

speed

Optional Parameters

latency

jitter

drop

dup_freq

reorder_freq

Category

WAN Emulation

TASK

Create WAN Path

Primary Script

lf_create_wanpath.py

Purpose

Typical User Requests

wan path

Required Parameters

port_A

port_B

speed

Optional Parameters

latency

jitter

drop

dup_freq

reorder_freq

Category

WAN Emulation

Run Continuous Throughput Test

Required Parameters

station

upstream_port

rate

duration

Optional Parameters

report

debug

Category

Traffic Testing

lf_dataplane_test.py

Required Parameters

station

rate

duration

report

debug

↓

↓

↓

↓

Monitor Progress

↓

↓

Return Results

lf_rvr_test.py

debug

Category

RF Testing

TASK

station

channel

duration

report

debug

RF Testing
